agents.prompt:
QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the Watch Party streaming/dashboard pages of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (canonical theme ‚Äî do NOT re-derive):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces glass: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`, dynamic color on API 31+. Player sheets use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)`; the new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE (UI/Compose files only; skip networking/server/streaming-engine internals):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/WatchPartyHostDashboardView.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/client_dashboard/WatchPartyClientDashboardView.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/DevicePermissionDialog.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/WatchPartyPlayerMonitoringView.kt`
- Any other `*View.kt`/`*Sheet.kt`/`*Dialog.kt`/`*Screen.kt` under `feature/watch_party/ui/` ‚Äî list which you read.

EFFORT: medium (about 5-8 tool calls ‚Äî this feature is larger).

WHAT TO FLAG (file:line cited, concrete only):
1. Hardcoded colors where `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` is correct (distinguish intentional dark/black surfaces vs deviations).
2. Missing/broken transparency or blur ‚Äî opaque backgrounds where glass is intended; transparent content with no blur and no fallback scram (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. Layout sizing ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions diverging from siblings, `dp` where `sp` belongs.
4. Material 3 deviations ‚Äî hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; deprecated M2 patterns.
5. Animation gaps ‚Äî abrupt state changes (waiting/connecting/ready/error) where `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` siblings uso.
6. Accessibility ‚Äî missing `contentDescription` on meaningful icons/buttons, tap targets <48dp-height equivalent.

OUTPUT (strict):
- VERDICT: one-line (Clean / Minor / Significant)
- EVIDENCE: bullets `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything needing runtime.
UI/style only. Skip room/network/sync logic bugs.

QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the Nearby Share feature of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (the app's canonical theme conventions ‚Äî do NOT re-derive these):
- Theme: `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces glass: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- Colors in `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`, dynamic color on API 31+.
- Player sheets use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)`; new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE (UI files only; skip networking/protocol files):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/nearbyshare/NearbyShareScreen.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/workspace/transfers/TransfersNearbyShareView.kt`
- Any other `*Screen.kt` or `*View.kt` or `*Sheet.kt` or `*Dialog.kt` under `feature/nearbyshare/` ‚Äî list which you read.

EFFORT: medium (about 4-6 tool calls).

WHAT TO FLAG (file:line cited, concrete only):
1. Hardcoded colors where `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` is correct (distinguish intentional dark/black surfaces vs deviations).
2. Missing/broken transparency or blur ‚Äî opaque backgrounds where glass is intended; transparent content with no blur and no fallback scram (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. Layout sizing ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions diverging from siblings, `dp` where `sp` belongs.
4. Material 3 deviations ‚Äî hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; missing `contentColor` inheritance on tinted surfaces; deprecated M2 patterns.
5. Animation gaps ‚Äî abrupt state changes (empty/loading/error/results) where `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` siblings uso.
6. Accessibility ‚Äî missing `contentDescription` on meaningful icons/buttons, tap targets <48dp-height equivalent.

- VERDICT: one-line (Clean / Minor / Significant)
- EVIDENCE: bullets `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything needing runtime to confirm.
UI/style only. Skip networking, protocol, device discovery logic bugs.

agents.prompt:
QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the File Manager feature of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (the app's canonical theme conventions ‚Äî do NOT re-derive these):
- Theme: `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces a glass aesthetic: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- Colors in `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- The app uses Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`.
- Dynamic color (Material You) is enabled on API 31+.
- Sheets in the player use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)` over the video; new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE: Only these files under `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/filemanager/`:
- `FileManagerScreen.kt` (primary UI)
- `FileManagerNode.kt`
- `FileManagerViewModel.kt` (only state-driven UI concerns, skip business logic)

EFFORT: medium (about 4-6 tool calls). Read the files, then report.

WHAT TO FLAG (only concrete, file:line-cited issues):
1. **Hardcoded colors** that should use `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` ‚Äî e.g. literal `Color.White`, `Color.Black`, `0xFFxxxxxx`, `Color(0xCC000000)` for backgrounds where the themed `surface` would be correct. Note cases where a literal dark/black is INTENTIONAL (a video/camera surface, onboarding bg) vs a deviation.
2. **Missing blur / broken transparency** ‚Äî backgrounds that look opaque when the design intent is glass; or `Color.Transparent` content with no blur and no fallback (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. **Layout sizing issues** ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes that won't scale with typography, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions that differ from sibling sheets, `dp`-based sizes that should be `sp` (or vice versa).
4. **Material 3 deviations** ‚Äî e.g. using `Text` with hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; missing `contentColor` inheritance.
5. **Animation/transition gaps** ‚Äî abrupt state changes with no `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` where siblings use them.

OUTPUT (strict):
- VERDICT: one-line overall (Clean / Minor issues / Significant issues)
- EVIDENCE: bullet list, each item `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why it's wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything you couldn't determine without running the app.
Do NOT propose fixes to business logic, logic bugs, or non-UI concerns. UI/style only.

content.text:
Assignment metadata:
- objective: QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the File Manager feature of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (the app's canonical theme conventions ‚Äî do NOT re-derive these):
- Theme: `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces a glass aesthetic: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- Colors in `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- The app uses Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`.
- Dynamic color (Material You) is enabled on API 31+.
- Sheets in the player use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)` over the video; new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE: Only these files under `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/filemanager/`:
- `FileManagerScreen.kt` (primary UI)
- `FileManagerNode.kt`
- `FileManagerViewModel.kt` (only state-driven UI concerns, skip business logic)

EFFORT: medium (about 4-6 tool calls). Read the files, then report.

WHAT TO FLAG (only concrete, file:line-cited issues):
1. **Hardcoded colors** that should use `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` ‚Äî e.g. literal `Color.White`, `Color.Black`, `0xFFxxxxxx`, `Color(0xCC000000)` for backgrounds where the themed `surface` would be correct. Note cases where a literal dark/black is INTENTIONAL (a video/camera surface, onboarding bg) vs a deviation.
2. **Missing blur / broken transparency** ‚Äî backgrounds that look opaque when the design intent is glass; or `Color.Transparent` content with no blur and no fallback (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. **Layout sizing issues** ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes that won't scale with typography, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions that differ from sibling sheets, `dp`-based sizes that should be `sp` (or vice versa).
4. **Material 3 deviations** ‚Äî e.g. using `Text` with hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; missing `contentColor` inheritance.
5. **Animation/transition gaps** ‚Äî abrupt state changes with no `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` where siblings use them.

OUTPUT (strict):
- VERDICT: one-line overall (Clean / Minor issues / Significant issues)
- EVIDENCE: bullet list, each item `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why it's wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything you couldn't determine without running the app.
Do NOT propose fixes to business logic, logic bugs, or non-UI concerns. UI/style only.
- role: explorer
- resolved_type: explore

spec.objective:
QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the Watch Party streaming/dashboard pages of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (canonical theme ‚Äî do NOT re-derive):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces glass: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`, dynamic color on API 31+. Player sheets use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)`; the new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE (UI/Compose files only; skip networking/server/streaming-engine internals):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/WatchPartyHostDashboardView.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/client_dashboard/WatchPartyClientDashboardView.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/DevicePermissionDialog.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/watch_party/ui/host_dashboard/WatchPartyPlayerMonitoringView.kt`
- Any other `*View.kt`/`*Sheet.kt`/`*Dialog.kt`/`*Screen.kt` under `feature/watch_party/ui/` ‚Äî list which you read.

EFFORT: medium (about 5-8 tool calls ‚Äî this feature is larger).

WHAT TO FLAG (file:line cited, concrete only):
1. Hardcoded colors where `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` is correct (distinguish intentional dark/black surfaces vs deviations).
2. Missing/broken transparency or blur ‚Äî opaque backgrounds where glass is intended; transparent content with no blur and no fallback scram (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. Layout sizing ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions diverging from siblings, `dp` where `sp` belongs.
4. Material 3 deviations ‚Äî hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; deprecated M2 patterns.
5. Animation gaps ‚Äî abrupt state changes (waiting/connecting/ready/error) where `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` siblings uso.
6. Accessibility ‚Äî missing `contentDescription` on meaningful icons/buttons, tap targets <48dp-height equivalent.

OUTPUT (strict):
- VERDICT: one-line (Clean / Minor / Significant)
- EVIDENCE: bullets `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything needing runtime.
UI/style only. Skip room/network/sync logic bugs.

spec.objective:
QUESTION: Find style/layout/color/theme UI issues in the Nearby Share feature of the HOA Video Player Android app.

ALREADY_KNOWN (the app's canonical theme conventions ‚Äî do NOT re-derive these):
- Theme: `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/core/theme/Theme.kt` forces glass: `background = Transparent`, `surface = 0x66000000` (40% opaque dark), `onBackground/onSurface = White`, `surfaceVariant = 0x4D000000`.
- Colors in `core/theme/Color.kt`: Primary `0xFF6C5CE7`, Secondary `0xFF00CEC9`, Tertiary `0xFFFD79A8`.
- Jetpack Compose Material 3, `minSdk=30`, `compileSdk=36`, dynamic color on API 31+.
- Player sheets use translucent `containerColor = Color(0xCC000000)`; new subtitle sheet uses `Transparent` + `Modifier.blur(5.dp)` on API 31+.

SCOPE (UI files only; skip networking/protocol files):
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/nearbyshare/NearbyShareScreen.kt`
- `app/src/main/java/com/helpofai/videoplayer/feature/workspace/transfers/TransfersNearbyShareView.kt`
- Any other `*Screen.kt` or `*View.kt` or `*Sheet.kt` or `*Dialog.kt` under `feature/nearbyshare/` ‚Äî list which you read.

EFFORT: medium (about 4-6 tool calls).

WHAT TO FLAG (file:line cited, concrete only):
1. Hardcoded colors where `MaterialTheme.colorScheme.*` is correct (distinguish intentional dark/black surfaces vs deviations).
2. Missing/broken transparency or blur ‚Äî opaque backgrounds where glass is intended; transparent content with no blur and no fallback scram (unreadable over arbitrary content).
3. Layout sizing ‚Äî hardcoded text sizes, mismatched paddings, `fillMaxHeight` fractions diverging from siblings, `dp` where `sp` belongs.
4. Material 3 deviations ‚Äî hardcoded `fontSize` instead of `MaterialTheme.typography.*`; `ButtonDefaults` with non-themed colors; missing `contentColor` inheritance on tinted surfaces; deprecated M2 patterns.
5. Animation gaps ‚Äî abrupt state changes (empty/loading/error/results) where `AnimatedVisibility`/`Crossfade` siblings uso.
6. Accessibility ‚Äî missing `contentDescription` on meaningful icons/buttons, tap targets <48dp-height equivalent.

OUTPUT (strict):
- VERDICT: one-line (Clean / Minor / Significant)
- EVIDENCE: bullets `file.kt:line ‚Äî issue ‚Äî why wrong ‚Äî suggested fix`
- GAPS: anything needing runtime to confirm.
UI/style only. Skip networking, protocol, device discovery logic bugs.
